name: ReferralReady Agent
description: MCP-powered referral packet generation from synthetic FHIR-like data for clinician review.
sample_prompts: Prepare a nephrology referral packet for synthetic patient SYN-CKD-001.
Check cardiology referral completeness for synthetic patient SYN-HF-002.
Generate care coordination tasks for synthetic patient SYN-DM-003 endocrinology referral.
